name: Main Entrance
description: Primary campus entrance with automatic sliding doors and wheelchair ramp
accessibilityNotes: Automatic doors, flat entry, tactile paving

name: Library
description: Main campus library with study spaces, computer labs, and quiet zones
accessibilityNotes: Elevator to all floors, accessible restrooms, adjustable desks

name: Lecture Theatre 1
description: Large lecture theatre seating 300, with hearing loop and wheelchair spaces
accessibilityNotes: Hearing loop, wheelchair seating in front rows, captioning available

name: Lecture Theatre 2
description: Medium lecture theatre seating 150, ground floor access
accessibilityNotes: Ground floor access, hearing loop installed

name: Lecture Theatre 3
description: Compact lecture theatre seating 80, first floor via elevator or stairs
accessibilityNotes: Accessible via elevator in Building C

name: Student Hub & Cafeteria
description: Central student space with café, food court, lounge areas, and student services
accessibilityNotes: Fully accessible, lowered counter service, accessible seating

name: Building A — Innovation Centre
description: Houses IT labs, engineering workshops, and innovation spaces
accessibilityNotes: Ramp at east entrance, elevator to all floors

name: Building B — Arts & Design
description: Arts studios, design labs, and gallery space. Upper floors accessed by stairs only.
accessibilityNotes: Ground floor accessible only. Upper floors require stairs — no elevator.

name: Building C — Health Sciences
description: Health sciences classrooms, nursing simulation labs, and counselling rooms
accessibilityNotes: Full elevator access, accessible restrooms on every floor

name: Accessible Parking
description: Designated accessible parking bays near the main entrance with flat pathways to campus
accessibilityNotes: 6 designated accessible bays, flat pathway to main entrance, covered walkway

name: Elevator — Building A
description: Main elevator in Building A, serves all 4 floors
accessibilityNotes: Braille buttons, audio announcements, wide doors

name: Ramp — Library Entrance
description: Gentle gradient ramp at the library south entrance
accessibilityNotes: 1:20 gradient, handrails both sides, non-slip surface

name: Administration Office
description: Student enrolment, finance, and administrative services
accessibilityNotes: Power-assisted entry doors, lowered service counter

name: Sports & Recreation Centre
description: Gymnasium, indoor courts, swimming pool, and fitness centre
accessibilityNotes: Pool hoist available, accessible change rooms, all ground level
